overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator showing a first-person driver's perspective during heavy rainfall. The bus navigates wet urban streets with active windshield wipers, stopping at designated bus shelters to pick up passengers and waiting at traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban bus route with commercial buildings

events.description: approaching first bus stop with passengers waiting

agents.ego_description: driving bus through heavy rain on urban street, windshield wipers active, approaching bus stop

notable_agents.action: group of people waiting at bus shelter for the bus to arrive

entered.detail: Modern glass and concrete commercial buildings lining the left side of the street
Rain-soaked multi-lane road with reflective surface and active wipers
Glass and metal bus shelter with bench and passengers waiting
Row of trees lining the right sidewalk along the commercial district

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through heavy rain on a wet urban street lined with modern commercial buildings. Windshield wipers move continuously across the glass as the vehicle approaches a bus stop where pedestrians are waiting under a shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter with boarding area

events.description: bus comes to complete stop at bus stop shelter
bus doors open to allow passenger boarding
doors close and bus begins accelerating away from stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop with doors open, allowing passengers to board the vehicle

notable_agents.action: woman in black tank top entering through the front door
man in striped shirt following behind to board the bus

entered.detail: Concrete boarding platform with tactile paving at the bus shelter
Commercial building entrance visible behind the bus stop structure

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at the shelter, opening its doors to allow two passengers to board. The camera view shifts slightly to show the door area as the woman and man enter, then the doors close and the bus prepares to depart.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban street with traffic control

events.description: bus stops at red traffic light behind large delivery truck
traffic light turns green and bus proceeds through intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating from bus stop, driving along tree-lined street, stopping at red traffic light behind truck, then proceeding on green

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck stopped at the traffic light ahead of the bus

entered.detail: Traffic signal showing red then changing to green at intersection
Large dark-colored delivery truck stopped at the traffic light

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a tree-lined street, approaching an intersection where it stops behind a large delivery truck at a red light. After the light turns green, the bus proceeds through the intersection continuing its route.

scene_state.functional_zone: second bus stop shelter on commercial street

events.description: bus stops at second bus stop shelter
passenger boards and bus departs from stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at second bus stop, opening doors for passenger to board

notable_agents.action: woman with blonde hair wearing dark top boarding the bus

entered.detail: Glass and metal bus shelter structure with bench and lighting

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops at a second bus stop shelter. A woman with blonde hair boards the vehicle through the front door. After she enters, the doors close and the bus pulls away continuing down the wet street.

events.description: bus approaches and stops at red traffic light at intersection
light turns green and bus continues through intersection

agents.ego_description: departing second stop, continuing journey through wet urban streets, stopping at traffic light then proceeding

entered.detail: Metal barriers and bollards along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus continues its route through the rainy urban environment, passing commercial buildings and street furniture. It stops at a traffic light before proceeding through the intersection, with windshield wipers maintaining visibility through the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver navigating a rain-slicked urban environment as the vehicle moves from a commercial district through a residential street. It begins with the bus driving through heavy rain past modern commercial buildings, with windshield wipers clearing the glass as the vehicle approaches a passenger shelter. As the bus comes to a halt, the view shifts slightly toward the open doors to allow a man and a woman to board before the doors close and the journey resumes. The scene then transitions to a tree-lined street where the bus slows to a stop behind a large delivery truck at a red light. Finally, the light turns green and the camera moves forward through the intersection to continue along the wet route.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a bus navigates a rain-slicked urban route from a passenger pickup to a city intersection. It begins with the vehicle slowing to a halt at a bus stop shelter, where a blonde woman boards through the front door. As the doors close, the bus pulls away and accelerates down the wet street, passing a blur of commercial buildings and street furniture. The scene then shifts as the bus approaches a traffic light, coming to a brief stop before proceeding through the intersection. Throughout the movement, the windshield wipers rhythmically clear the heavy rainfall to maintain visibility of the gray, urban environment.
